name: dev-discipline
description: PreToolUse discipline hooks that fire at the trigger word, where memory entries don't: pause-and-pick reminders (about-to-`rmap new`, about-to-add-`[[task]]`-via-direct-edit, about-to-`sleep N`/poll) plus three roadmap/tasks.toml integrity guards — block masking work as `assignee = "human"` without a `# human:` blocker, warn on demand-hedge phrasing, warn on evidenceless `status = "done"`.
